name: Form

unions.name: Form
unions.comment:
- `state`: Typically a record containing fields and possibly other forms.
  - `accessors`: Typically a record containing getters/setters and anything else that needs access to the state of the form.
  - `error`: The errors produced by an invalid form.
  - `output`: The data produced by a valid form.

aliases.name: Accessor
aliases.type: { get : state -> a, modify : (a -> a) -> state -> state }

values.name: get
values.comment: Get the value of a property on the given form.
values.type: (accessors -> Form.Accessor state a) -> Form.Form state accessors error output -> a

values.name: isInvalid
values.comment: `True` if the form has errors. `isInvalid form` is equivalent to `not (isValid form)`.
values.type: Form.Form state accessors error output -> Basics.Bool

values.name: isValid
values.comment: `True` if the form does not have any errors.
values.type: Form.Form state accessors error output -> Basics.Bool

values.name: modify
values.comment: Modify the value of a property on the given form.
values.type: (accessors -> Form.Accessor state a) -> (a -> a) -> Form.Form state accessors error output -> Form.Form state accessors error output

values.name: new
values.type: { init : state, accessors : accessors, validate : state -> Validation.Validation error output } -> Form.Form state accessors error output

values.name: set
values.comment: Set the value of a property on the given form.
values.type: (accessors -> Form.Accessor state a) -> a -> Form.Form state accessors error output -> Form.Form state accessors error output

values.name: toState
values.type: Form.Form state accessors error output -> state

values.name: update
values.comment: Update the value of a property on the given form.
values.type: (accessors -> state -> state) -> Form.Form state accessors error output -> Form.Form state accessors error output

values.name: validate
values.type: Form.Form state accessors error output -> Validation.Validation error output

values.name: validateAsMaybe
values.type: Form.Form state accessors error output -> Maybe.Maybe output

values.name: validateAsResult
values.type: Form.Form state accessors error output -> Result.Result (List.List error) output

name: Form.List

unions.name: Forms
unions.comment: An ordered list of uniquely identifiable forms. The identifiers are automatically assigned and managed.

aliases.name: Id
aliases.comment: An identifier is represented by a non-negative integer.

values.name: append
values.comment: Add a form to the end of the list.
values.type: form -> Form.List.Forms form -> Form.List.Forms form

values.name: empty
values.comment: Create an empty list of forms.
values.type: Form.List.Forms form

values.name: fromList
values.comment: Create an ordered list of uniquely identifiable forms derived from the given list of forms.
values.type: List.List form -> Form.List.Forms form

values.name: get
values.comment:
Get the value of a property associated with the form identified by the given identifier.

If the form with the given identifier cannot be found then `Nothing` is returned.
values.type: Form.List.Id -> (accessors -> Form.Accessor state a) -> Form.List.Forms (Form.Form state accessors error output) -> Maybe.Maybe a

values.name: modify
values.comment:
Modify the value of a property associated with the form identified by the given identifier.

If the form with the given identifier cannot be found then no change is made.
values.type: Form.List.Id -> (accessors -> Form.Accessor state a) -> (a -> a) -> Form.List.Forms (Form.Form state accessors error output) -> Form.List.Forms (Form.Form state accessors error output)

values.name: prepend
values.comment: Add a form to the start of the list.
values.type: form -> Form.List.Forms form -> Form.List.Forms form

values.name: remove
values.comment:
Remove the form identified by the given identifier.

If the form with the given identifier cannot be found then no change is made.
values.type: Form.List.Id -> Form.List.Forms form -> Form.List.Forms form

values.name: set
values.comment:
Set the value of a property associated with the form identified by the given identifier.

If the form with the given identifier cannot be found then no change is made.
values.type: Form.List.Id -> (accessors -> Form.Accessor state a) -> a -> Form.List.Forms (Form.Form state accessors error output) -> Form.List.Forms (Form.Form state accessors error output)

values.name: toList
values.type: Form.List.Forms form -> List.List ( Form.List.Id, form )

values.name: update
values.comment:
Update the value of a property associated with the form identified by the given identifier.

If the form with the given identifier cannot be found then no change is made.
values.type: Form.List.Id -> (accessors -> state -> state) -> Form.List.Forms (Form.Form state accessors error output) -> Form.List.Forms (Form.Form state accessors error output)

values.name: validate
values.type: (Form.List.Id -> x -> y) -> Form.List.Forms (Form.Form state accessors x output) -> Validation.Validation y (List.List output)

values.name: validateAsMaybe
values.type: (Form.List.Id -> x -> y) -> Form.List.Forms (Form.Form state accessors x output) -> Maybe.Maybe (List.List output)

values.name: validateAsResult
values.type: (Form.List.Id -> x -> y) -> Form.List.Forms (Form.Form state accessors x output) -> Result.Result (List.List y) (List.List output)
